creator: anubas@hotmail.com
text:
No matter which php70 extension I try to install, I see mysql56-client as a dependency. This dependency is not listed in the ports database. Is this an issue with the new php70 extension packages or did my pkg database somehow get corrupted?

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=php70&stype=name&sektion=all

<output>
$ pkg install php70-json-7.0.3
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.
Checking integrity... done (1 conflicting)
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
The following 4 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

Installed packages to be REMOVED:
        mariadb100-client-10.0.23
        mariadb100-server-10.0.23

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        php70-json: 7.0.3
        mysql56-client: 5.6.27

The operation will free 150 MiB.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: n
</output>
